Tests the behavior of `Number.prototype.toString` after deletion in JavaScript.

# Purpose
This code snippet tests the behavior of the `Number.prototype.toString` method in JavaScript. It first deletes the `toString` method from the `Number.prototype` object. Then, it uses an `assert` statement to verify that calling `toString` on `Number.prototype` returns the string `"[object Number]"`. This test checks if the default `toString` method from `Object.prototype` is used after the deletion, ensuring that the prototype chain functions as expected.
